# DialerSeat — Dial Smarter. Close Faster.

> This site offers comprehensive information about DialerSeat, an affordable, easy-to-use outbound dialer solution. It provides structured details on features, pricing, how it works, and comparative advantages, enabling LLMs to understand its core functionalities, target users, and value propositions.

## Core Content
[Main Landing Page](https://dialerseat.com)

- Overview of DialerSeat as a professional outbound dialer built for volume calling.
- Pricing details: $35/week, no contracts, cancel anytime.
- Key features:
  - Predictive Dialing: multi-lead calling with live connection focus.
  - Voicemail Detection: skips voicemails efficiently.
  - Multiple Campaigns: run multiple campaigns simultaneously.
  - Memory of Marked Leads: retain dispositions, notes, callbacks.
  - Manual Dialer: manual control when needed.
  - Team Workflow: multiple agents with individual logins.
  - Global Support: international dialing capability.
  - User-Friendly UI: easy setup on desktop and mobile.
  - Data Ownership: leads are preserved even after cancellation.
- How-to workflow:
  - Sign up, upload leads, launch campaigns, track performance.
- Comparison with competitors:
  - Cost advantages.
  - Feature-set superiority.
  - No setup fees.

## Pricing & Plans
- Detailed plan: DialerSeat Pro - $35/week per seat.
- Inclusions:
  - Predictive Dialing
  - Voicemail detection
  - Unlimited campaigns and leads
  - Data persistence
  - Global operation
  - No setup fee
- Call to action: [Get Started](https://dialerseat.com/sign-up)

## Feature Details
- Predictive Dialing
- Voicemail Detection
- Multi Campaign Management
- Lead and Disposition Memory
- Manual Dialer
- Team Workflow Management
- Global Dialing Support
- Mobile Compatibility
- Secure Data Ownership

## How It Works
- Sign up with email or Google, payment is weekly.
- Upload leads via CSV, name campaigns.
- Launch campaigns and monitor in real-time.
- Disposition calls and analyze performance.

## Comparison & Advantages
- Cost efficiency: significantly cheaper than competitors.
- Feature richness: offers predictive dialing, voicemail detection, and team features.
- Unlimited leads and campaigns included.
- No contracts or setup fees.
- Data is retained after cancellation, ensuring continuity.

## Resources
- [Sign Up](https://dialerseat.com/sign-up)
- [See How We Compare](#compare)
